title: Show HN: TikZ Editor – WYSIWYG editor for figures in LaTeX
summary: 一个开源的所见即所得TikZ编辑器，支持拖拽编辑和源码同步，由AI编码助手Codex构建。
translated_summary: An open-source WYSIWYG TikZ editor that allows visual editing of LaTeX figures by dragging and resizing, with synchronized source code and rendered output, built almost entirely by the Codex coding agent.
